no: Provided by Transitions As of this writing (v3 AKA 0.3), Themed Tweaks changes SoD to be more roleplay friendly and removes content that characters shouldn’t know about yet.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

conflicts.reason: HARD conflict on cn:200 vs Transitions cn:140. Both are functionally identical (same CUT59B.BCS script). TT cn:200 has REQUIRE_PREDICATE that auto-skips if Transitions cn:140 is installed — so cn:200 ALWAYS fails when cn:140 is present. REMOVED TT cn:200 . Also cn:80/140/150 fail due to BD0120.BCS corruption (LEXER ERROR) caused by earlier mods modifying the SoD script — same root cause as A7-MagicStore. Transitions cn:10 (BG1 dream) coexists safely.
conflicts.source: TT tp2 REQUIRE_PREDICATE !(MOD_IS_INSTALLED transitions.tp2 #L-TRANSITIONS-RESTORE_POWER); identical CUT59B scripts, 2026-04
conflicts.myComps: #200 Use Irenicus in hell movie as dream
conflicts.theirComps: #10 Use BGI ending movie as dream #140 Use Irenicus in hell movie to restore powers

ki.pattern: ERROR Installing \[SoD.*Stat-based observations\]|ERROR Installing \[SoD.*snark\]|ERROR Installing \[SoD.*Remove cut scenes\]
ki.description: SoD-dependent components (cn:80, 140, 150) fail if BD0120.BCS is corrupted by earlier mods that trigger decompile round-trip failures on SoD area scripts. The LEXER ERROR at line 1 indicates the BCS file was truncated. mod_installer's golden BCS backup guard prevents this by restoring the pristine BD0120.BCS before each WeiDU invocation.
ki.workaround: These components require an uncorrupted BD0120.BCS. Check which earlier mod broke the script. May need to adjust install order or skip conflicting mods.

sum: This mod main purpose is to augment the role-playing environment throughout the game series. To that end, it tweaks the storyline in various places.

co.n: SoD - Give Imoen a special wand for palace attack scene
co.tp2n: SoD - Give Imoen a special wand for palace attack scene

co.n: SoD - Allow PC to give aid to Imoen after attack in palace
co.tp2n: SoD - Allow PC to give aid to Imoen after attack in palace

co.n: SoD - Stat-based observations and quest options
co.tp2n: SoD - Stat-based observations and quest options

co.n: SoD - Quest: Scouting the Coast Way Crossing
co.tp2n: SoD - Quest: Scouting the Coast Way Crossing

co.n: SoD/BG2EE - Add a little snark to dialogues
co.tp2n: SoD/BG2EE - Add a little snark to dialogues

co.n: SoD/BG2EE - Remove cut scenes that the PC shouldn't be privy to
co.tp2n: SoD/BG2EE - Remove cut scenes that the PC shouldn't be privy to

co.n: SoD/BG2EE - Move dreams about Irenicus from SoD to BG2EE
co.tp2n: SoD/BG2EE - Move dreams about Irenicus from SoD to BG2EE

co.n: BG2EE - Give Imoen innnate Magic Missiles for attack scene
co.tp2n: BG2EE - Give Imoen innnate Magic Missiles for attack scene

co.n: BG2EE - Use Irenicus in hell movie as dream to restore Bhaalspawn powers
co.tp2n: BG2EE - Use Irenicus in hell movie as dream to restore Bhaalspawn powers
co.no: Uses Irenicus hell movie as dream to restore Bhaalspawn powers. Soft overlap with Transitions #140 which does similar.

advisories.reason: Both modify SoD story dialogue and quest flow. Install order matters; some changes may overlap
advisories.myComps: #60 Imoen wand #70 Aid Imoen #80 Stat observations #90 Ditch Corwin #100 Scouting quest #140 Snark dialogues #150 Remove cutscenes #160 Move dreams
advisories.theirComps: #10 Consistency Changes #30 Informed Replies #50 Officer Reactions
